warnings: Closure remains dependent on organization-specific telemetry and confirmation that the packet’s incident-specific recovery gates are satisfied.
Consumers must preserve the packet uncertainty labels and must not reinterpret unknown values as confirmed coordinates.
Focused fixture tests validate the hunt contract but do not substitute for the separate Postgres importer and production-route gates.
Klue and its incident-reporting domain are legitimate vendor/source context, not attacker infrastructure; IOC fields remain limited to supported attacker-controlled observables.
Postgres import and production page/feed/search verification are downstream gates and are not proven by this review artifact.
Responders should prioritize incident-specific selectors and evidence requirements over any shared workflow language.
Tenant scoping and closure depend on OAuth integration token revocation, downstream access review, and confirmation that replacement credentials are active.
resolution: All Agency lanes have no blocking findings. Uncertainty labels and downstream production-verification requirements are preserved.
